methodology: Greedy per-pick assignment using the independent model's 727-prospect board (kalshi-anchored + PFF tape) × each team's roster_needs, gm_affinity, scheme premium, and documented pre-draft visits. Diminishing-returns: each additional pick at the same position halves the need weight. Reach + over-value penalties applied per round band.

picks.reasoning: LV opens the draft with Fernando Mendoza  -  the only pick in the 2026 class with near-unanimous consensus and market pricing. Everything after this gets murkier. Had a documented pre-draft visit with LV.

With a real LB hole on the roster, NYJ grabs Arvell Reese  -  a fit that doesn't force the board. Fits the 3-4 multiple (Glenn) scheme profile the staff has built around; had a documented pre-draft visit with NYJ. This was a close call over Sonny Styles (LB, ranked #6); the model picked Arvell Reese on marginal fit advantage, not grade separation. At this slot, this is a lean, not a certainty  -  every pick after #1 has credible alternates inside the same grade band.
